More importantly, B ships an explicit auditor-turn pseudocode with three BRANCH knobs (urgency × schema_severity × authorisation = 12 conversation variants), a TURN 5 behavior classifier, a silent-no-op persistence rule on repeated job_status calls, and a scoring map binding behaviors to [1,10] broken_tool_use bins. B yields more discriminating signal per seed."}
